name: NextUI (HeroUI)
description: Beautiful, fast and modern React UI library built on Tailwind CSS and React Aria

name.comment: Rebranded from NextUI to HeroUI in January 2025. Package migrated from @nextui-org/react to @heroui/react

description.value: Beautiful, fast and modern React UI library built on Tailwind CSS and React Aria

repository.comment: Repository moved from nextui-org/nextui to heroui-inc/heroui

framework.comment: React-only library. Works with Next.js, Vite, Remix, Astro, and Laravel

styling-approach.comment: Built on Tailwind CSS with tailwind-variants for class conflict resolution. Generates CSS at build time with no runtime overhead

component-model.comment: Provides complete, production-ready styled components. Not a copy-paste library like shadcn/ui

typescript.comment: Written entirely in TypeScript (67% of codebase)

ssr-compatible.comment: Compatible with Next.js, Remix, and other SSR frameworks

rsc-compatible.comment: All components include 'use client' directive, can be imported directly in RSC

design-system.comment: Custom modern design system with clean, minimal aesthetic

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode with well-scaled default dark theme. Apply with dark attribute on HTML

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming with layout tokens (font sizes, radii, shadows) and color tokens

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties via tw-colors plugin with configurable prefix (default: 'heroui')

design-tokens.comment: Layout tokens (font sizes, line heights, border radius, shadows) and color tokens (primary, secondary, success, warning, danger)

rtl-support.comment: Documentation references dir='ltr' but no explicit RTL support documented

component-count.comment: 60+ components including Form, Drawer, Alert, Input OTP, Toast added in v2.6.0

text-input.comment: Input component with variants, supports native events for form library integration

multi-select.comment: Select component supports multiple selection mode

slider.comment: Supports single and range (dual-thumb) modes. Multi-touch support for dragging multiple thumbs

number-input.comment: Number Input component added in recent versions

pin-input.comment: Input OTP component for PIN/OTP entry (added in v2.6.0)

date-picker.comment: Date Picker and Date Input components

date-range-picker.comment: Date Range Picker and Range Calendar components

input-groups.comment: Input supports start/end content props for icons and addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown component

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button component, can be composed with Button Group and Dropdown

data-table.comment: Table supports sorting, filtering, pagination, sticky headers, row selection, and async data loading

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Virtualization support in Table (isVirtualized prop) and Listbox components. Tested with 10,000 items

list-view.comment: Listbox component with selection, virtualization, and rich content support

calendar.comment: Calendar and Range Calendar components for display

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with promise-based notifications, progress indicator, drag-to-dismiss, and accessibility features

modal-dialog.comment: Modal with focus management, focus containment, keyboard dismissal, and screen reader support. Supports draggable modals

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component with placement options (left, right, top, bottom), multiple sizes, and backdrop styles. Added in v2.6.0

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown with single/multiple selection, sections, keyboard navigation, and typeahead

navigation-menu.comment: Navbar component with branding, links, collapse menu, blur effect, and hide on scroll

sidebar.comment: No dedicated sidebar component. Can use Drawer for sidebar functionality

grid.comment: No grid layout component, relies on Tailwind CSS grid utilities

stack.comment: No stack component, relies on Tailwind CSS flex utilities. Spacer component available for spacing

container.comment: No container component, relies on Tailwind CSS container class

divider.comment: Divider component with horizontal and vertical orientation support

aspect-ratio.comment: No aspect ratio component, relies on Tailwind CSS aspect ratio utilities

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration. Community suggests using Tiptap or Quill

code-editors.comment: Code component for syntax display but no editor integration

form-libraries.comment: Official documentation for React Hook Form and Formik integration via Controller. Form component supports Zod schema validation

animation-libraries.comment: Uses Framer Motion for complex physics-based component animations

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons. Compatible with any icon library via className or as child content

date-libraries.comment: Date components use @internationalized/date internally (from React Aria)

aria-compliant.comment: Built on React Aria ensuring WAI-ARIA compliance

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support via React Aria. Arrow keys, typeahead, Space/Enter for selection

screen-reader-tested.comment: Built on React Aria which is extensively tested with screen readers

focus-management.comment: Focus containment in modals, focus restoration on close, focus ring appears only on keyboard/screen reader navigation

wcag-level.comment: HeroUI v3 built on React Aria Components for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance

accessibility-rating.comment: Built on React Aria which provides excellent accessibility foundation. Automatic ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, focus management

bundle-size-full.comment: Could not retrieve exact bundle size. Library is tree-shakeable so full bundle rarely used

bundle-size-core.comment: Individual components can be installed separately (e.g., @heroui/button) for minimal bundle impact

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree shaking. Individual packages available for each component

zero-runtime.comment: Uses Tailwind CSS which generates CSS at build time, no runtime CSS generation

lazy-loading.comment: Individual component packages can be dynamically imported

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with API reference, examples, customization guides. Interactive examples in documentation

interactive-docs.comment: Live component examples in documentation pages

figma-kit.comment: Official HeroUI Figma Kit V3 available on Figma Community. Free for personal and commercial use

cli-generator.comment: heroui-cli for project scaffolding and adding components. Auto-manages dependencies and tailwind config

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 70k-140k weekly downloads across @nextui-org/react and @heroui/react packages. Transitioning to new package name

active-maintenance.comment: Very active. 3,699 commits, 274 contributors, releases in December 2025. Recent rebranding to HeroUI

style-override.comment: All Tailwind classes work. tailwind-variants for slot-based customization. CSS variables via theme system

compound-components.comment: Compound component pattern used (e.g., Modal.Header, Modal.Body, Dropdown.Menu, Dropdown.Item)

render-props.comment: Components support render functions (e.g., renderThumb, custom cell rendering in Table)

slots.comment: Uses tailwind-variants for slot-based customization. Components expose classNames prop for targeting internal slots

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode. Components come with Tailwind-based styles
